response.justification: Maria has strong distributed systems experience, deep full-stack expertise, and clear ownership mindset through founder roles and operational work, but her resume lacks explicit evidence of AI-driven code generation environments, Python mastery (critical for the role), and direct experience with agentic systems as a baseline — instead, she mentions contributing to AI-agent infrastructure without demonstrating deep hands-on review/extension of AI-generated code.
strengths: Proven track record in high-throughput, distributed systems (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Strong full-stack versatility with TypeScript, Node.js, and systems-level languages like DLang
Demonstrated operational ownership and open-source leadership through GISCollective and dev-ops infrastructure work
concerns: No clear evidence of Python mastery — only JavaScript/TypeScript emphasized, despite Python being a must-have
AI-agent infrastructure exposure is mentioned but not demonstrated as deep, hands-on review/extension of AI-generated code
Lacks explicit experience with agile ceremonies or rotating scrum champion role as required
